full_text:
Tufa Shujineng 禿髮樹機能
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Tufa Shujineng (禿髮樹機能)was born in Hexei. Xianbei chieftain. He raided and warred with Jin, but was defeated by Ma Long. Tufa Shujineng was affiliated with Xianbei. Tufa Shujineng lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
